privileged_info_summary: The task successfully mandates rendering a 60-frame PNG sequence at 1080x1080 resolution, conforming to the Instagram square standard. The background color Hex #0066CC is mathematically verified to equal RGB (0, 102, 204). The output destination is explicitly hardcoded in the testing scripts as /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/square_scene.
